text:
Once upon a time in a quiet hillside village, there was a peculiar little girl named Lily. Lily was unusual for many reasons; she had vivid dreams that often came true, and she was gifted in music – she could play any instrument she heard with an inexplicable touch. Her favorite thing, though, was collecting stamps.

Every day after school, Lily would trot home, eager for her stamp collection. Her room was filled with stamps from far-off lands. Each stamp had a story; a place name, a famous person, a moment in history. She would arrange them by country, album, color, size.

One day, while organizing her latest collection, Lily discovered a particularly rare stamp – a moon owl from the moonlit glades of Owlimbet. She tucked it into a special album she titled "Stars and Whispers."

Suddenly, something felt different. The air shimmered. Lily started hearing whispers, faint but unmistakable. They were talking about her talent, about
